mapper.sql: select bp.bound_id, o.order_id, o.order_no, COALESCE(o.journal_code, '') as journal_code, COALESCE(o.category, '') as category, COALESCE(o.unit_type, '') as unit_type, COALESCE(o.distribute_type, '') as distribute_type, COALESCE(o.send_method, '') as send_method_name, COALESCE(oi.year, YEAR(o.create_time)) as year_id, COALESCE(bp.receive_user, o.shipping_name, s.real_name, '') as receive_user, COALESCE(bp.receive_unit, s.company, '') as receive_unit, COALESCE(bp.receive_address, o.shipping_address, s.address, '') as receive_address, COALESCE(bp.receive_postcode, o.shipping_zip_code, s.zip_code, '') as receive_postcode, o.create_time as order_time, COALESCE(o.order_book_num, oi.qty, 1) as order_book_num, bp.send_book_time, COALESCE(bp.send_user, '') as send_user, o.total_amount as rmb_order_cost, COALESCE(bp.can_post, '1') as can_post, o.meeting_id, bp.create_by, bp.create_time, bp.update_by, bp.update_time, bp.remark from publisher_order o left join publisher_bound_post bp on o.order_id = bp.order_id left join publisher_subscriber s on o.subscriber_id = s.subscriber_id left join ( select order_id, min(year) as year, sum(qty) as qty from publisher_order_item group by order_id ) oi on o.order_id = oi.order_id
mapper.select:
(o.order_type = '1' or o.order_type = 'bound') AND o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%') AND o.journal_code = #{journalCode} AND o.category like concat('%', #{category}, '%') AND o.unit_type like concat('%', #{unitType}, '%') AND o.distribute_type like concat('%', #{distributeType}, '%') AND o.send_method like concat('%', #{sendMethodName}, '%') AND COALESCE(oi.year, YEAR(o.create_time)) = #{yearId} AND COALESCE(bp.receive_user, o.shipping_name, s.real_name, '') like concat('%', #{receiveUser}, '%') AND COALESCE(bp.receive_unit, s.company, '') like concat('%', #{receiveUnit}, '%') AND COALESCE(bp.receive_address, o.shipping_address, s.address, '') like concat('%', #{receiveAddress}, '%') AND COALESCE(bp.receive_postcode, o.shipping_zip_code, s.zip_code, '') like concat('%', #{receivePostcode}, '%') AND COALESCE(o.order_book_num, oi.qty, 1) = #{orderBookNum} AND bp.send_user like concat('%', #{sendUser}, '%') AND o.meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND bp.send_book_time is not null AND bp.send_book_time is null
AND o.order_id in
#{id}
order by o.create_time desc, o.order_id desc
mapper.update: update publisher_bound_post set receive_address = '', update_time = sysdate() where can_post = '0' and receive_address is not null and receive_address <> ''
